7:["$","div",null,{"className":"callout callout-warning","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-start gap-3","children":[["$","$L1a",null,{"ref":"$undefined","iconNode":[["path",{"d":"m21.73 18-8-14a2 2 0 0 0-3.48 0l-8 14A2 2 0 0 0 4 21h16a2 2 0 0 0 1.73-3","key":"wmoenq"}],["path",{"d":"M12 9v4","key":"juzpu7"}],["path",{"d":"M12 17h.01","key":"p32p05"}]],"className":"lucide-triangle-alert shrink-0 mt-0.5","size":18}],["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"className":"block mb-1","children":"Not Yet Implemented"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"text-sm leading-relaxed","children":["$","p",null,{"children":["Encryption at rest (AES-256-GCM or equivalent) is not yet implemented in the Mnemosyne constructor. The ",["$","code",null,{"children":"Memory()"}]," class does not accept an ",["$","code",null,{"children":"encryption_key"}]," parameter. This page documents the planned feature. Use filesystem-level encryption in the meantime."]}]}]]}]]}]}]
8:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Current Recommendations"}]
9:["$","p",null,{"children":"Since application-level encryption is not yet available, protect data at rest using:"}]
a:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Filesystem Encryption"}]
b:["$","$L1b",null,{"code":"# LUKS full-disk encryption (Linux)\ncryptsetup luksFormat /dev/sdb1\ncryptsetup luksOpen /dev/sdb1 mnemosyne-data\n\n# Mount encrypted volume\nmount /dev/mapper/mnemosyne-data /data\n","language":"bash"}]
c:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Database File Permissions"}]
d:["$","$L1b",null,{"code":"# Restrict access to database file\nchmod 600 /data/mnemosyne.db\nchown mnemosyne:mnemosyne /data/mnemosyne.db\n","language":"bash"}]
e:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Environment Isolation"}]
f:["$","p",null,{"children":"Run Mnemosyne in isolated environments (containers, VMs) with encrypted storage volumes to prevent unauthorized access to the SQLite database file."}]
10:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Planned Features"}]
11:["$","p",null,{"children":"When implemented, encryption is expected to cover:"}]
12:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Data"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Planned"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Notes"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Memory content"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Yes"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"All text content"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Embeddings"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"No"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Vectors not encrypted (performance)"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Metadata"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Partial"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Tags, source; timestamps not"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Semantic triples"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Yes"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Subject, predicate, object"}]]}]]}]]}]

Memory databases contain sensitive user data and conversation history."}]}]]}]]}]}]
